title: Oru Pani Thuli Lyrics Kanda Naal Mudhal
stanzas:
karu karu karu karu
kannu pattu vaadi vidum
vaasa malli
sandhanatha poosividunga

aduthathu aduthathu eppavunnu
maamiyaaru ketkum munne
ara dozen pethu kodunga.

thaga thaga thaga thaga
thanga silai thavikkudhu
vetkathula podhum adha
vittuvidunga.

aariraaro aariraao
naalaikkunnu thevapadum
thaalaattula onne rendu
kaththukodunga.

un pani thuli pani thuli
enai suduvathu suduvathu yeno.
en suriyan suriyan suriyan
adhil uruguthu uruguthu yeno

idhu nanavai thondrum kanavu
idhu kaalaiyil thondrum nilavu
idhu kannai kannai parithu
velicham tharum iravu.

kadhalaa kadhalaa
ennamum koosuthe
aasaiyum naananum
sandaigal poduthe

un pani thuli pani thuli
enai suduvathu suduvathu yeno.
en suriyan suriyan suriyan
adhil uruguthu uruguthu yeno

karu karu karu karu
kannu pattu vaadi vidum
vaasa malli
sandhanatha poosividunga

aduthathu aduthathu eppavunnu
maamiyaaru ketkum munne
ara dozen pethu kodunga.

thaga thaga thaga thaga
thanga silai thavikkudhu
vetkathula podhum adha
vittuvidunga.

aariraaro aariraao
naalaikkunnu thevapadum
thaalaattula onne rendu
kaththukodunga.

viralgalum nagangalum
thottu konda nerangal
enni adhai paarththillai
enndru pogum oorugal.

yedho oru thendral modhi
mella mella marinom
unnai naanum
ennai neeyum
engae endru thaedinom

nammai sutri koottam
vandhum thaniyaanom.
thanimaiyil nenjukulle
pesalaanom.
pesum podhe pesum podhe
mounam aanom

un pani thuli pani thuli
enai suduvathu suduvathu yeno.
en suriyan suriyan suriyan
adhil uruguthu uruguthu yeno

mugathirai kulle nindru
kannaamoochi aadinaai.
poiyaal oru maalai katti
poosai seidhu soodinaai

nizhalgalil ulle ulla
nijangalai thaedinen.
neeyaai adhai solvaai ena
nithamum naan vaadinen.

solla ninaithen aanaal
vaarthai illai.
unnai vittal yaarum
ingae sondham illai.

sondham endru yaarum ini
thaevayillai.

un pani thuli pani thuli
enai suduvathu suduvathu yeno.
en suriyan suriyan suriyan
adhil uruguthu uruguthu yeno

idhu nanavai thondrum kanavu
idhu kaalaiyil thondrum nilavu
idhu kannai kannai parithu
velicham tharum iravu.

kadhalaa kadhalaa
ennamum koosuthe
aasaiyum naananum
sandaigal poduthe

en suriyan suriyan suriyan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Pani Thuli, the lyrics beautifully express the feelings of love and longing between two individuals. Set against the backdrop of Kanda Naal Mudhal, the song conveys a sense of nostalgia and joy, making it perfect for romantic occasions. The collaboration between Shankar Mahadevan and Shreya Goshal adds depth to the emotions, creating a memorable listening experience. The melody, composed by Yuvan, resonates with anyone who has experienced the sweetness of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Pani Thuli from Kanda Naal Mudhal is a delightful duet that captures the essence of romance with its enchanting melodies. Featuring the soulful voices of Shankar Mahadevan and Shreya Goshal, this song is a perfect blend of emotion and musicality. Yuvan's masterful composition elevates the listening experience, making it a timeless favorite for lovers everywhere.
stanzaMeanings: The soft, gentle eyes are like a breeze, bringing the fragrance of jasmine flowers.
What will happen next? The aunties always ask, so give them a dozen answers.
The beautiful statue is being admired, so let it be and move on.
Oh, oh, tomorrow will bring a divine rhythm, so tie two together.
Your soft touch makes me feel something deep. My sun seems to melt in it.
This is a dream that awakens me, a morning that brings light, and it gives brightness to my eyes at night.
Love, love, I am also feeling desires and fighting battles.
Your soft touch makes me feel something deep. My sun seems to melt in it.
The soft, gentle eyes are like a breeze, bringing the fragrance of jasmine flowers.
What will happen next? The aunties always ask, so give them a dozen answers.
The beautiful statue is being admired, so let it be and move on.
Oh, oh, tomorrow will bring a divine rhythm, so tie two together.
The moments of touch and laughter are not counted, and the towns will say they are gone.
There is a gentle breeze that softly changes, and I search for you and me, wondering where we are.
We wander together but feel alone. In solitude, we speak to our hearts. When we speak, we become silent.
Your soft touch makes me feel something deep. My sun seems to melt in it.
You stand still, hiding your eyes. With a lie, you create a necklace of words and wear it.
I searched for the truths within the shadows. You are the one who speaks them, and I sing them every day.
I thought of speaking, but there are no words. If I leave you, there is no one here.
No one needs to be here anymore, as we are together.
Your soft touch makes me feel something deep. My sun seems to melt in it.
This is a dream that awakens me, a morning that brings light, and it gives brightness to my eyes at night.
Love, love, I am also feeling desires and fighting battles.
Your soft touch makes me feel something deep. My sun seems to melt in it.
